steps.title: Use the battery detail
steps.content: The batteries described cannot be easily taken out and swapped for new ones. That means they are internal to the small devices. The blank needs a verb showing that portable consoles and other electronics have these batteries inside them.

steps.title: Choose the fitting verb
steps.content: A fits because contain means to hold within: the devices contain batteries. B would mean make batteries ready, which devices do not do. C would require the devices to imagine. D would mean the devices discover batteries, which does not describe a physical component inside hardware. The answer is A.
